title: File Version mismatch for pre beta versions

posts.author: Glen (Glen Webster)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. The version facility is really good. However as its a newish facility you cannot change the actual version number. For instance if previously I have uploaded 8 revisions of a file and the used then come to do a 9th revision using the version facility then it would appear as version 1 instead of version 9. I think that the ability for the board owner to change these number to reflect the ACTUAL version would be invaluable. At the moment I am having to label the update as something like V1_6, V2_7, V3_8 If you take my point.

Thanks.

Glen

posts.author: RichardT (Richard )
posts.cookedHtml: We have exactly the same problem. We would lie to move all out ISO documentation into Monday but it would mean having to reset the versions for dozens of documents,
